ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle model */,
  "model_year" INTEGER /* Year the vehicle model was produced */,
  "engine_displacement" REAL /* Engine displacement in liters */,
  "num_cylinders" INTEGER /* Number of cylinders in the engine */,
  "aspiration_type" TEXT /* Type of aspiration (e.g., Turbocharged, Naturally Aspirated) */,
  "num_gears" INTEGER /* Number of gears in the transmission */,
  "lockup_torque_converter" TEXT /* Indicates if the vehicle has a lockup torque converter (Y/N) */,
  "drive_system" TEXT /* Drive system type (e.g., Rear, All-Wheel) */,
  "max_ethanol" REAL /* Maximum percentage of ethanol compatible with the engine */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel used (e.g., Gasoline, Diesel) */,
  "combined_fuel_efficiency" REAL /* Combined fuel efficiency in miles per gallon */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle (e.g., Sedan, SUV, Truck) */,
  "engine_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the engine types table */,
  "transmission_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the transmissions table */,
  "drivetrain_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the drivetrains table */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_drive_system FOREIGN KEY ("drive_system") REFERENCES drivetrains ("drivetrain_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_num_gears FOREIGN KEY ("num_gears") REFERENCES transmissions ("transmission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_engine_displacement FOREIGN KEY ("engine_displacement") REFERENCES engine_types ("engine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_fuel_type FOREIGN KEY ("fuel_type") REFERENCES fuel_types ("fuel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engine_types" (
  "engine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engine type */,
  "engine_name" TEXT /* Name or designation of the engine type */,
  "displacement_range" TEXT /* Range of engine displacement for this type */,
  "cylinder_range" TEXT /* Range of cylinders applicable to this engine */,
  "aspiration_type" TEXT /* Type of aspiration used (e.g., Turbocharged, Naturally Aspirated) */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Compatible fuel types for this engine */,
  "horsepower_range" TEXT /* Range of horsepower produced by this engine */,
  "torque_range" TEXT /* Range of torque produced by this engine */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fuel_types" (
  "fuel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fuel type */,
  "fuel_name" TEXT /* Name of the fuel type (e.g., Gasoline, Diesel) */,
  "emissions_rating" TEXT /* Emissions rating for the fuel type */,
  "energy_density" REAL /* Energy density of the fuel type (BTU/gal) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fuel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transmissions" (
  "transmission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transmission type */,
  "transmission_type" TEXT /* Type of transmission (e.g., Automatic, Manual) */,
  "num_gears" INTEGER /* Number of gears in the transmission */,
  "lockup_torque" TEXT /* Indicates if lockup torque converter is used (Y/N) */,
  "gear_ratios" TEXT /* Gear ratios of the transmission */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transmission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drivetrains" (
  "drivetrain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drivetrain type */,
  "drivetrain_type" TEXT /* Type of drivetrain (e.g., FWD, RWD, AWD) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the drivetrain characteristics */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("drivetrain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ethanol_specs" (
  "ethanol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ethanol specification */,
  "max_ethanol_percentage" REAL /* Maximum percentage of ethanol the engine can handle */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the specification */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ethanol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fuel_efficiency_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fuel efficiency log entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle model */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date of the recorded fuel efficiency */,
  "fuel_efficiency" REAL /* Recorded fuel efficiency in miles per gallon */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fuel_efficiency_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Name or username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle model being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_options" (
  "option_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each option */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle model */,
  "option_name" TEXT /* Name of the option (e.g., Sunroof, Navigation) */,
  "option_description" TEXT /* Description of the option */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("option_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_options_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle model */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of image (e.g., exterior, interior) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_images_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle model */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the reviewer (1-5) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_reviews_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_comparisons" (
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comparison */,
  "model_id_1" INTEGER /* Reference to the first vehicle model */,
  "model_id_2" INTEGER /* Reference to the second vehicle model */,
  "comparison_text" TEXT /* Text of the comparison */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comparison_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_comparisons_model_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("model_id_2") REFERENCES vehicles ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_comparisons_model_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("model_id_1") REFERENCES vehicles ("model_id")
)
